response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with 15+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, current staff-level fullstack work at Google in TypeScript/Node.js including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and prior TypeScript/React/AWS/MongoDB product work at Meta. He brings demonstrated testing craftsmanship (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience, and a CS degree. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest exposure, though his breadth suggests fast ramp-up, and his staff-level seniority may exceed the mid-senior scope of the role.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development at Google, directly matching the required AI agent experience
Deep fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across Google, Meta, and RIDE, well beyond the 6+ year requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent Node.js and Jest-style testing depth is evident
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated, limiting immediate coverage of the secondary backend stack
Staff-level seniority at Google may make a mid-senior IC internal-tooling role a retention and motivation risk
